## The problem

What are you trying to do that Waves makes hard today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like Waves to do?

## Charter fit

Waves aims to stay a native, quiet per-app mixer (not a DAW or EQ suite). How
does this fit that scope? See `PRODUCT.md` / `DESIGN.md`.
